name: Banana-brownies, Lo Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a 9-inch square baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, cocoa, milk powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Puree banana, sugar, egg whites, buttermilk (or additional dry ingredients), and vanilla extract in a food processor until smooth.
5. Add the dry ingredient mixture to the food processor and pulse just until blended.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cut into squares.
